case_title: DUCKWALD, PATRICK VS ROSENTHAL, PAUL C T D et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DUCKWALD, PATRICK AS TO DEFENDANT ROSENTHAL, PAUL C T D CERAMIC TILE DESIGN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-03-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ROSENTHAL, PAUL C T D

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUCKWALD, PATRICK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CERAMIC TILE DESIGN PLAINTIFF STIPULATES THAT HE IS NOT PROCEEDING AGAINST PAUL ROSENTHAL, AN INDIVIDUAL. CERAMIC TILE DESIGN (NAMED AS CTD IN THE CLAIM) WAIVES ANY ISSUES CONCERNING HOW IT IS NAMED IN THE COMPLAINT OR SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
